title: Better Commands
description:
It's in the name
This is just better vanilla commands
body: Its in the name.\ This plugin contains reworked vanilla commands for servers. This plugin adds for example timed stop command 1. Send /timedstop 1 minute command 2. It will announce server shutdown in 1 minute 3. After 1 minute the server will stop. \ Simple right? If you want log for this example here you have it: >timedstop 1 minute\ >[08:44:24 INFO]: CONSOLE: Server will be stopped in 1 minute\ >[08:45:24 INFO]: CONSOLE: Stopping the server..\ >[08:45:24 INFO]: Stopping server Remember to read config.yml if you are using Pterodactyl Panel or Similar! Made by ganamaga Contact E-Mail for this project is : admin@vitekform.cz
